---
description: "Create a new reusable UI component for the Bolão app with proper TypeScript types, styling, and composition"
---

# New Component

Create a new component at `components/${input:fileName}.tsx`.

## Requirements

- Purpose: ${input:purpose}
- Use TypeScript with explicit interface for props
- Follow the World Cup 2026 color palette
- Use `cn()` from `@/lib/utils` for conditional classes
- Use `forwardRef` if the component wraps a native HTML element
- Export as named export (not default)

## Palette Quick Reference

```
Elevated bg:   #122448
Borders:       #1E3A6E
Muted text:    #94B8D8
Gold:          #FFD60A
Green:         #22C55E
Red:           #EF4444
Blue:          #38BDF8
```
